title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Hyderabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions:
Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions!
